overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a gritty urban border district with a massive concrete wall in the background. The scene features harsh desert sunlight, passing vehicles, scattered pedestrians, and dense urban architecture with graffiti-covered concrete buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with metal scaffolding structures

events.description: passing a green van driving on the road to the left
approaching intersection with crosswalk and waiting traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a metal fence structure, observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: green van driving past on the road
person walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: tall metal pipe fence structure with horizontal bars running along the sidewalk
large concrete wall with graffiti including flag design and text
large reddish-brown rock formation towering over the district buildings
two-tone yellow and red building with metal awning and industrial details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal scaffolding fence on the right. A large graffiti-covered retaining wall runs parallel on the left while a massive red rock mountain looms in the background. Vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road as the character approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing with multi-lane road and turning maneuver

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
turning left after crossing to walk up the inclined street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left to walk along the street, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large green military truck driving along the road
pedestrian with backpack walking ahead in same direction

entered.detail: large green cargo truck with canvas cover and industrial design
temporary concrete barriers with graffiti separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, navigating between passing vehicles including a prominent green military truck. After crossing, they turn left onto an inclined street. The concrete retaining wall remains visible on the left while the red rock mountain dominates the background view.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill street with dense buildings and massive background wall

events.description: beige van passing by closely on the left side of the street
approaching corner and preparing to turn right into narrower street

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined street alongside traffic, passing various pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: beige van driving past on the road
group of pedestrians gathered near street vendor stall

entered.detail: enormous white concrete wall with faded lettering stretching across the horizon
small vendor setup with blue tarps and displayed goods on the sidewalk
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street between poles

segments.scene_description: Walking up the steep street, the massive concrete border wall becomes visible in the distance, dominating the skyline. The character passes a street vendor setup on the right and navigates around a beige van. Overhead power lines crisscross the bright sky as the character approaches a corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between buildings with air conditioning units

events.description: turning right into narrow alley between buildings with storefronts
entering shaded area under building overhang reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow side street and walking past storefronts with metal security shutters

entered.detail: small commercial building with metal security shutters and satellite dish
red and white automated vending machine near building entrance
pile of black vehicle tires stacked on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrower street, leaving the open road behind. The scene shifts to a more enclosed space with a corner store featuring metal shutters and a vending machine. The lighting becomes mixed as the character enters the shadow of the building overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with construction barriers and industrial equipment

events.description: navigating around yellow and red striped construction barriers
approaching building entrance with vending machines and utility boxes

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage between buildings, passing air conditioning units and construction barriers

entered.detail: yellow and red striped metal barrier blocking part of the pathway
large external air conditioning compressors mounted on building exterior wall
stacked wooden boards leaning against building wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a tight alleyway with construction barriers and industrial equipment. The character navigates around yellow and red striped barriers while passing large outdoor AC units mounted on the building wall. The space is narrow and enclosed with minimal sky visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gritty urban border district that transitions from a roadside sidewalk to a steep climb toward a massive concrete wall. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk bordered by metal scaffolding and a graffiti-covered retaining wall, with a red rock mountain looming in the distance. As the camera reaches an intersection, it navigates through traffic and passes a green military truck before turning left onto an inclined street. The scene then shifts upward along the steep road, passing a street vendor and a beige van while power lines crisscross the bright sky. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal the colossal concrete border wall dominating the skyline as the character approaches a street corner.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open urban road into a claustrophobic industrial alleyway. It begins as the character turns right into a narrower street, leaving the brightness of the main road for a more enclosed space featuring a corner store with metal shutters and a vending machine. As the camera moves forward, the lighting shifts from harsh sunlight to mixed shadows beneath a building overhang. The scene then tightens further as the path opens into a narrow alleyway filled with construction barriers and industrial equipment. Finally, the camera navigates around yellow and red striped barriers and large outdoor AC units mounted on the walls, with the surrounding architecture almost entirely blocking the sky.
